entities.name: Dynamic Exploration
entities.context: Phase 2 of strategic sessions, 15-20 minutes of iterative challenge/exploration/synthesis cycles

entities.name: Convergence & Action
entities.context: Phase 3 of strategic sessions, 5-7 minutes for synthesizing insights and identifying next steps

entities.name: Challenge-Exploration-Synthesis Cycles
entities.context: Iterative methodology applied during dynamic exploration phase

entities.name: Active Nuances
entities.context: Applied continuously during exploration to surface assumptions and blind spots

entities.name: Weekly Review
entities.context: Where unresolved tensions from sessions are surfaced for later processing

entities.name: Quality Metrics
entities.context: Framework for tracking session effectiveness including insights, assumptions, blind spots, perspective shifts

entities.name: Blind Spots
entities.context: Identified during sessions, target 3-5 per session

entities.name: Insights
entities.context: Primary session output, target 5-7 per session with confidence tracking

entities.name: Assumptions
entities.context: Surfaced during exploration, target 10-15 per session

entities.name: Pending Knowledge Updates
entities.context: Generated during convergence phase as session output

entities.name: strategic-partner
entities.context: CLI tool for running strategic sessions, supports audio input

entities.name: Strategic Session
entities.context: 20-30 minute optimal session structure across multiple phases
